overview: A concierge practice combining primary care with functional and integrative medicine to address the whole patient. Offers functional medicine evaluations, genetic testing, nutritional guidance, and a longevity program for early detection and prevention of age-related changes.
highlights: Functional medicine evaluations with genetic testing
Longevity Program for preventive age-related assessment
targetAudience: Individuals seeking comprehensive functional medicine with emphasis on prevention, chronic disease management, and wellness optimization.
